title: Fix hex monitor to show workplan execution details

phases.title: Update monitor to show real-time workplan progress

tasks.title: Update hex-cli/src/commands/monitor.rs get_recent_activity() to query /api/sched/queue/history instead of /api/hexflo/memory/search, parse workplan summaries from result JSON showing completed/failed task counts
Add /api/sched/queue/history endpoint to hex-nexus that returns last 20 sched tasks with id, kind, status, payload, result, completed_at fields
